title: Soul Devourer
content:
The 
Soul Devourer
 are cultivator's nascent soul who, after dying, entered the space rift and became Wandering Soul. These Wandering Soul devour each other and when they become strong enough, they become Soul Devourer and can devour Wandering Soul and Material Space.

Considered as the King of Wandering Soul, and can form a Soul Gem to easily create Wandering Soul. Rarely devour each other. They live in the World of decay where only corpse exist apart from them, and take lot of time to become one.

Wang Lin took around 4700 years to become one thanks to the Heaven-Defying Bead and being in a corpse to act as a beacon.

Tuo Sen tried to create one but only had created a half Soul Devourer after all these years emprisoned.
